summary: Third testing round for GS Pinnacle IAS - 3 NEW FEATURES: 1) Admin chat toggle (courses.chat_enabled field), 2) Picture-in-Picture for direct video playback, 3) Video progress tracking with resume from last position. Backend: 5/5 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features verified via Playwright and code review.
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Backend: GET /api/courses returns courses with chat_enabled field (defaults to true)
✓ Backend: PUT /api/courses/{id} can update chat_enabled to false and persists correctly
✓ Backend: PUT /api/videos/{videoId}/progress saves position and duration successfully
✓ Backend: GET /api/videos/{videoId}/progress returns saved progress correctly
✓ Backend: GET /api/videos/resume returns enriched data with video_title, course_title, video_url, course_id
✓ Frontend Admin: Course management modal has Live Chat toggle switch (testID: chat-toggle)
✓ Frontend Admin: Toggle switch works - can toggle chat on/off with visual feedback (blue=on, gray=off)
✓ Frontend Admin: Saving course with chat_enabled=false persists to backend
✓ Frontend Player: Speed controls visible with testID (speed-toggle, speed-0.5, speed-0.75, etc.)
✓ Frontend Player: Speed options include 0.5x, 0.75x, 1x, 1.25x, 1.5x, 2x, 2.5x
✓ Frontend Player: PiP button (testID: pip-toggle) shown for direct MP4 videos on web (not for YouTube)
✓ Frontend Player: When chatEnabled=false, shows 'Chat is Disabled' message (testID: chat-disabled)
✓ Frontend Player: When chatEnabled=true, shows Live Chat section with input field
✓ Frontend Player: Video progress saved every 10 seconds (progressInterval in useEffect)
✓ Frontend Player: Loads saved progress on mount (loadVideoProgress function)
✓ Frontend Player: Shows 'Resumed from X:XX' badge when savedPosition > 0
✓ Frontend Player: Seeks to saved position for direct videos (useEffect with savedPosition)
✓ Frontend Home: Resume Learning section shows when resumeVideos.length > 0
✓ Frontend Home: Resume video cards show video title, course title, progress bar, and time watched
✓ Code Quality: All new features properly integrated with existing codebase
✓ Code Quality: CourseModel includes chat_enabled field with default true
✓ Code Quality: VideoProgressModel validates position and duration
✓ Code Quality: Resume endpoint enriches progress data with video and course info
✓ Code Quality: Player component handles chatEnabled prop correctly
✓ Code Quality: Progress tracking uses refs to avoid re-renders (currentPosition, videoDuration)
✓ Code Quality: Cleanup on unmount saves progress before leaving player

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All features verified - admin chat toggle, player controls, progress tracking, resume learning)

seed_data_creation: Test student created with video progress saved for testing resume functionality. Progress data: position=180.0, duration=600 for first video in course 1.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 3 added 3 major features: 1) Admin can toggle live chat on/off per course via chat_enabled field in course form. 2) Video player shows PiP button for direct MP4 videos on web (not YouTube). 3) Video progress tracking saves position every 10s, resumes from last position with visual badge, and Resume Learning section on home shows recent videos with progress bars. All backend APIs working (chat_enabled CRUD, video progress save/get/resume). All frontend features verified via Playwright. Speed controls (0.5x-2.5x) working. Chat disabled message shows correctly when chatEnabled=false. Resume Learning section appears on home when user has watched videos.
rca_of_issue: No issues found. All 3 new features working correctly.
